Class BasicWindow

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.BasicWindow
Direct Known Subclasses:
FullScreenWindow
public class BasicWindow extends Object
Stores basic properties for a window to be displayed. Provides a show(int, int) method to set up and show the window.
See Also:
  • JFrame
  • BasicPanel
  • ScreenConfig

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    BasicWindow(String title, Image iconImage, boolean undecorated, boolean resizable, int windowWidth, int windowHeight, int desiredScreenWidth, int desiredScreenHeight, boolean preserveNativeAspectRatio)
    Constructs a basic window to be displayed.

    void
    show(int fps, int ups)
    Shows this window and updates static fields in ScreenConfig.

  • Constructor Details

    • BasicWindow

      public BasicWindow(String title, Image iconImage, boolean undecorated, boolean resizable, int windowWidth, int windowHeight, int desiredScreenWidth, int desiredScreenHeight, boolean preserveNativeAspectRatio)
      Constructs a basic window to be displayed.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the window (null for default title)
      iconImage - the icon image of the window (null for default icon)
      undecorated - whether the window is undecorated
      resizable - whether the window is resizable
      windowWidth - the width of the window (in pixels)
      windowHeight - the height of the window (in pixels)
      desiredScreenWidth - the desired width for the virtual screen (in pixels)
      desiredScreenHeight - the desired height for the virtual screen (in pixels)
      preserveNativeAspectRatio - whether the aspect ratio of the physical screen displaying the window should be preserved on the virtual screen

  • Method Details

    • show

      public void show(int fps, int ups)
      Shows this window and updates static fields in ScreenConfig.
      Parameters:
      fps - number of frames (render calls) per second
      ups - number of updates (update calls) per second
